'''sawama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:niceritrol|niceritrol]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-w-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niceritrol|niceritrol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sawama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæwæmæth|sæwæmæth]] || [[word:sæwæmæj|sæwæmæj]] || [[word:sæwæmæsh|sæwæmæsh]] || [[word:sæwæmæ|sæwæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sawawamath|sawawamath]] || [[word:sawawamaj|sawawamaj]] || [[word:sawawamash|sawawamash]] || [[word:sawawama|sawawama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sawamath|sawamath]] || [[word:sawamaj|sawamaj]] || [[word:sawamash|sawamash]] || [[word:sawama|sawama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sawafmafth|sawafmafth]] || [[word:sawafmafj|sawafmafj]] || [[word:sawafmafsh|sawafmafsh]] || [[word:sawafmaf|sawafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sawamatha|sawamatha]] || [[word:sawamaja|sawamaja]] || [[word:sawamasha|sawamasha]] || [[word:sawamaka|sawamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sawamath|sawamath]] || [[word:sawamaj|sawamaj]] || [[word:sawamash|sawamash]] || [[word:sawama|sawama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sawamathal|sawamathal]] || [[word:sawamajal|sawamajal]] || [[word:sawamashal|sawamashal]] || [[word:sawamakal|sawamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sawamaathatha|sawamaathatha]] || [[word:sawamaajaja|sawamaajaja]] || [[word:sawamaashasha|sawamaashasha]] || [[word:sawamaaka|sawamaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sawamathan|sawamathan]] || [[word:sawamajan|sawamajan]] || [[word:sawamashan|sawamashan]] || [[word:sawamakan|sawamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sawamathaoro|sawamathaoro]] || [[word:sawamajaoro|sawamajaoro]] || [[word:sawamashaoro|sawamashaoro]] || [[word:sawamakaoro|sawamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
